description: kennethreitz.org is Kenneth Reitz’s personal website, publishing essays, software project pages, talks, and other personal content. It includes a small public content API for blog, search, themes, oEmbed, and related site data.
summary: kennethreitz.org exposes one public HTTP API under `https://kennethreitz.org/api`, documented at `/api/` with an OpenAPI schema at `/api/schema/`; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
